title: Fungal nail infection

source.title: Fungal nail infections
source.population: People with suspected or established fungal infection of fingernails or toenails.
source.setting: Primary and dermatology assessment and diagnostic-sample documentation.
source.exclusions: Exact for fungal nail identity, risk context, colour and thickness change, brittle or crumbly nail, subungual debris, nail lifting or pain, spread, and clinician-obtained nail samples. Medication and liver-test advice are not mapped.

exact_location.heading: What are fungal nail infections and who is affected?

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports onychomycosis and fungal-nail terminology plus affected-nail, spread, trauma, and host-risk context.
